untranslatable_reason: Signal requires measurement of multi-month consolidation, earnings stabilization inflection, and economic data inflection points. These require external fundamental data and temporal pattern detection not available in the allowed indicator set. VIX equivalent (india_vix) used as proxy for sentiment extremes. Put/call ratio unavailable. Fundamental stabilization conditions cannot be translated to technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction implemented as both entry_long (after 40% decline with fear) and entry_short (after 40% rally with euphoria). Used india_vix as VIX proxy. Returns indicator used to measure 40% decline/advance from recent highs. Consolidation >6 months and fundamental stabilization conditions are untranslatable without external data. Stop loss set to -20% as specified. Hold period set to 1095 days (~3 years minimum). Position sizing parameter noted but not included in JSON schema. Exit conditions partially expressible: profit target (50% gain) and reversal detection used as proxy for fundamental deterioration.
